meaning: factor[生化] (血浆中的)哈格曼因子,凝血因子XII
examples: WHEN Bill McDermott and Jim Hageman Snabe jointly took the helm at SAP in February they promised to be much “bolder”.
WHEN Bill McDermott and Jim Hageman Snabe jointly took the helm at SAP in February they promised to be much "bolder".
There he toasted Hans and Ivan Hageman, two childhood friends from East Harlem who had, with Robin Hood seed money, founded a remedial school and counseling program.
